title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 14.
content:
There was an Old Person of Ischia,
    Whose conduct grew friskier and friskier;
    He danced hornpipes and jigs,
    And ate thousands of figs,
    That lively Old Person of Ischia.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 14."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
